enum: at least once a week, but not every day
for interaction with government bodies (e-government system), including obtaining information
downloading films, images, music; watching television or videos; or listening to the radio or music; playing video or computer games or downloading them
participating in social networks, communicating (accessing websites, chats, blogs or online discussions)
using Internet storage for personal purposes to store documents, images, music, videos or other files
conducting training activities for educational, professional or private purposes through an online course
conducting training activities for educational, professional or private purposes through an online course, except for full online courses
conducting training activities for educational, professional or private purposes through communication via the Internet with teachers or students using educational sites or portals
making an appointment with a specialist doctor through the Internet
searching for information related to health issues (medicines, medical services, advice, etc.) for yourself and others
telephone conversations through the Internet/Volp (Skype, iTalk, via webcam)
posting opinions on civil or political issues on websites (using blogs, social networks, etc.)
participating in online consultations, voting on civil or political issues (e.g. on urban planning issues, signing a petition, etc.)
selling goods and services over the Internet
using services related to travel or hotel accommodation while traveling
looking for work or sending a job application
searching for information about goods and services not previously mentioned

title: Share of the population aged 16 to 74 who used Internet services during the last three months, percent
